name: Autopilot Monitor
description: Autopilot Monitor provides real-time visibility into Windows Autopilot enrollments with live telemetry, intelligent diagnostics, and automated troubleshooting. It includes a bootstrap script deployed via Intune, a lightweight Monitoring Agent, a Backend API (Azure Functions), and a Next.js web dashboard for fleet analytics. It tracks enrollment phases, runs customizable analyze rules, collects diagnostics, and notifies teams to accelerate issue resolution.
author: Oliver Kieselbach

securityCheck.aiSummary: The code includes a remote agent bootstrap flow that downloads and runs code from a URL with integrity verification. This presents a legitimate admin pattern for Intune autopilot deployments but introduces supply-chain risk via remote execution. No credential harvesting, data exfiltration, or hardcoded secrets detected. Obfuscation patterns are not present.
